data.content: ReTake lightbox copy now explicitly states the beat reopens into the ready_for_implementation queue; target state remains RETAKE_TARGET_STATE. Quality gates: lint (warnings only), tsc --noEmit pass, unit tests 1843 pass, build pass with NODE_ENV=production. Commit pushed to origin/main: b80605933ddefde33e7dde83fb8464f2260eea7d.
